description: Style Note Crafted from genuine leather and designed with loads of organiser space, this wallet from hidekraft makes for a perfect addition to your handbag.Product Details Red wallet for women, press button fastening, eleven card holders, one insert pocket, two slip pockets, two main compartments, one transparent pouch and one pouch with flapWarranty: 180 daysMaterial and Care Leather Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlightSize 19 cm x 10 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
